workflowBuilder.emptyHint: No steps defined. Click "Add Step" or "Load Default Workflow" to begin.

validation.atLeastOneStep: At least one step is required.
validation.stepIdRequired: All steps must have an ID.
validation.stepIdInvalid: Step ID "{id}" is invalid (lowercase, underscores only).
validation.transitionDecisionRequired: Step "{id}": transition must have a decision name.
validation.transitionTargetRequired: Step "{id}": transition "{decision}" must have a target.
validation.revisionReturnToRequired: Revision step "{id}" must have a "return to" step.
validation.noCompletedPath: At least one step must have a transition to "Completed".

guide.title: Configuration Guide
guide.basicsDesc: Stages in the flow canvas execute top-down. Click any card to edit its name, assignee, and behavior toggles in the Inspector panel on the right. Use the ↑ / ↓ icons at the top-right of each card to reorder, and the 🗑 icon to delete.
guide.stageIntake: Intake Approval — The producer decides whether to accept the submission. Permanent rejection is optional, and the stage can also skip peer review and jump straight to producer review.
guide.stagePeerReview: Peer Review — Peer reviewers listen to the track and flag issues, then decide whether it passes or needs revision. Supports manual assignment or automatic assignment from a reviewer pool.
guide.stageProducerGate: Producer Gate — The producer decides whether to send the track to mastering or bounce it back for revision. Supports permanent rejection and sending the track back to any earlier stage.
guide.stageMastering: Mastering — The mastering engineer uploads the mastered output. Optionally requires confirmation after delivery.
guide.stageFinalReview: Final Review — The producer signs off on the mastered result. Supports permanent rejection and bouncing back to earlier stages.
guide.rolesDesc: Each stage has a default role (Producer, Mastering Engineer, Peer Reviewer, Submitter). Producer Gate, Mastering, and Final Review support pinning a specific member via the Inspector panel to override the default role.
guide.revisionDesc: Checking "Enable revision loop" attaches a revision step to the stage: when reviewers request changes, the submitter uploads a new version and the track automatically returns to this stage. You can independently name the revision step and assign it a role.
guide.reviewSettingsDesc: Peer review supports manual and automatic assignment. In automatic mode you can pick members to form a reviewer pool and specify the minimum number of reviews required before the track can advance.
guide.rejectTargetsDesc: Intake, Producer Gate, and Final Review support "Allow permanent rejection" (final reject, unrecoverable). Intake can also enable direct producer review to skip peer review. Producer Gate and Final Review can also add extra reject targets to send the track back to any earlier stage.
guide.note1: Stage order determines the advancement path. Once the last main stage completes, the track enters the completed state. Use the arrow icons on each card to reorder at any time.
guide.note2: Producers can still edit the workflow in album settings after creation, but removing or changing stages may affect in-flight tracks.
guide.note3: The editor validates before saving: at least one stage chain leading to completion must exist.

workflowEditor.visualDesc: Drag stage cards to reorder the flow, then edit the selected stage in the inspector. Main flow and revision loops are generated automatically.
workflowEditor.canvasDesc: Main stages are shown in execution order, with revision stages attached as loops to their parent stage.
workflowEditor.inspectorDesc: Edit the selected stage's label, role, and routing rules.
workflowEditor.noMembersHint: Add eligible team members first to configure assignee overrides and auto-assignment pools.
workflowEditor.directProducerHint: When enabled, the producer can jump from this intake stage straight to "{stage}" and skip peer review.
workflowEditor.directProducerUnavailable: No later producer review stage found
workflowEditor.extraRejectTargets: Extra reject targets (return to a previous stage)
workflowEditor.selectStageHint: Select a stage from the canvas to edit it.
workflowEditor.returnToCurrent: Returns to this stage after upload
workflowEditor.migrationWarning: The following tracks were migrated due to stage changes:

validation.reviewerPoolRequired: Stage "{label}" uses auto-assignment but has no reviewer candidates selected.
validation.reviewerPoolTooSmall: Stage "{label}" has fewer auto-assignment candidates than required reviewers.
validation.rejectTargetMustBeEarlier: Stage "{label}" has invalid reject targets: it can only reject to earlier stages.
validation.directProducerTargetMissing: Stage "{label}" has direct producer review enabled, but there is no later producer review stage to jump to.

workflowStep.deliveryPendingConfirmation: Uploaded and waiting for the mastering engineer's final confirmation.

workflowStep.deliveryPreviewNotice: Please listen and verify the file before uploading.

peerReview.heading: Peer Review: {title}
peerReview.subheading: Assigned reviewer workflow for source v{version}
peerReview.waveformHint: Clicks only move the play head. Switch to Annotate mode to click-add a point or drag-select a range.
peerReview.actionHint: After completing the checklist, choose the next step

revision.subheading: Respond to open issues and upload a new source audio version.

producer.heading: Producer Workspace: {title}
producer.subheading: Submission intake, peer review sign-off, and mastering gate decisions.
producer.intakeDesc: Choose a review path: send to peer review, or review directly yourself; or reject the submission.
producer.rejectFinalConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently reject this track? The submitter will not be able to resubmit it, and audio files will be deleted from the server after 1 day.
producer.rejectResubmittableConfirmMessage: The track will be returned. The submitter may resubmit it.
producer.waveformHint: Clicks only move the play head. Switch to Annotate mode to add producer notes.
producer.intakeHint: Review the submission and decide whether to accept it into the workflow
producer.gateHint: Review peer feedback and decide the next step for this track

finalReview.heading: Final Review: {title}
finalReview.subheading: Producer and submitter both need to approve the current master delivery.
finalReview.waveformHint: Clicks only move the play head. Switch to Annotate mode to add final-review issues.
finalReview.actionHint: Both producer and submitter must approve to complete the final review

issueDetail.audioMaxReached: At most {max} audio files per comment
issueDetail.noVisibleIssues: No issues match the current filter
issueDetail.outdatedVersionTitle: This issue was raised on source v{issueVersion}; the track is now on v{currentVersion}
issueDetail.outdatedVersionBody: This detail view has switched to the source audio version where the issue was raised, and the marker is shown in that original context. You can still open version compare to inspect it against the current version.
issueDetail.outdatedVersionUnavailable: The original source-version audio is unavailable, so this page cannot restore the marker in its original context. You can still return to the track page for the current-version view.
issueDetail.outdatedWaveformHint: The waveform is now playing the source-version audio where this issue was originally raised, with the marker restored.
issueDetail.outdatedWaveformUnavailable: The source-version audio for this issue is unavailable, so the marker is hidden here.
issueDetail.commentsEmptyHint: No comments yet — be the first to leave a note.
issueDetail.keyboardHint: Space play/pause · ←/→ seek ±5s · J/K prev/next issue

archive.title: Archived Tracks
archive.description: Archived tracks will be permanently deleted after 14 days. The producer can restore them before then.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.archiveDesc: Archiving hides the album from active lists. After 14 days, the album (and all its tracks and files) will be permanently deleted.
danger.archiveConfirm: Archive "{title}"? The album can be restored within 14 days, after which it will be permanently deleted along with all tracks and files.
danger.restoreDesc: This album is archived. Restoring it will return it to the active list.
danger.archivedBanner: This album was archived on {date} and will be permanently deleted in {days} days.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.deleteDesc: Deleting permanently removes the circle's members, invite codes and workflow templates. Archived albums will be detached from the circle (preserved). You must first handle any non-archived albums before deleting.
danger.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
danger.leaveDesc: After leaving you will lose access to this circle's resources. The owner cannot leave — delete the circle instead.

danger.desc: Permanently close your account. Your account will be anonymized and your session invalidated immediately. If you own any circles or produce any non-archived albums, you must handle those resources first.
